instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall downshift when engine speed falls below the calibrated downshift threshold.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger downshift when Engine_Speed drops below Downshift_RPM.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed < Downshift_RPM THEN Shift_Command = Downshift
IF Shift_Command = Downshift AND Gear_Position != First_Gear THEN Execute_Shift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall perform downshift when vehicle speed decreases below the calibrated speed limit.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall initiate downshift when Vehicle_Speed falls below Downshift_Speed.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed < Downshift_Speed THEN Shift_Command = Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall downshift when both engine speed and vehicle speed are below calibrated limits.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall command downshift when Engine_Speed and Vehicle_Speed fall below thresholds.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed < Downshift_RPM AND Vehicle_Speed < Downshift_Speed THEN Shift_Command = Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall downshift when high throttle demand is detected.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall command downshift when Throttle_Position exceeds Throttle_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Throttle_Position > Throttle_Limit THEN Shift_Command = Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall downshift during vehicle deceleration.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger downshift when vehicle deceleration exceeds the calibrated threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Acceleration < Deceleration_Limit THEN Shift_Command = Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall downshift during braking conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall permit downshift when Brake_Pedal_Status is active and engine speed falls below the threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Brake_Pedal_Status = Pressed AND Engine_Speed < Downshift_RPM THEN Shift_Command = Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall perform downshift during high load demand.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall command downshift when Engine_Load exceeds Load_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Load > Load_Limit THEN Shift_Command = Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall downshift when engine torque demand increases.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall command downshift when Engine_Torque exceeds Torque_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Torque > Torque_Limit THEN Shift_Command = Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall downshift during low speed climbing conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger downshift when Vehicle_Speed falls below Hill_Speed_Threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed < Hill_Speed_Threshold THEN Shift_Command = Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall perform downshift when engine speed falls within the calibrated range.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall command downshift when Engine_Speed falls within the downshift band.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed BETWEEN Downshift_Min_RPM AND Downshift_Max_RPM THEN Shift_Command = Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall downshift during moderate acceleration demand.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger downshift when throttle demand exceeds Moderate_Throttle.

L4_requirements: IF Throttle_Position > Moderate_Throttle THEN Shift_Command = Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall downshift during overtaking conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall command downshift when high throttle demand and low engine speed are detected.

L4_requirements: IF Throttle_Position > Throttle_Limit AND Engine_Speed < Downshift_RPM THEN Shift_Command = Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall downshift when vehicle load increases suddenly.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall command downshift when Engine_Load exceeds Load_Threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Load > Load_Threshold THEN Shift_Command = Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall perform downshift when approaching steep slopes.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger downshift when vehicle acceleration indicates slope climbing.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Acceleration < Slope_Acceleration_Limit THEN Shift_Command = Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall perform downshift when vehicle speed falls below the optimal range.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall command downshift when Vehicle_Speed enters the downshift operating band.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed BETWEEN Downshift_Min_Speed AND Downshift_Max_Speed THEN Shift_Command = Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall downshift during high torque demand.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall command downshift when engine torque demand exceeds calibrated limits.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Torque > Torque_Limit THEN Shift_Command = Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall downshift during low RPM conditions to maintain engine performance.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger downshift when Engine_Speed falls below Minimum_RPM.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed < Minimum_RPM THEN Shift_Command = Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall perform downshift during dynamic driving conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall command downshift when engine speed, vehicle speed, and throttle inputs satisfy calibrated limits.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed < Downshift_RPM AND Vehicle_Speed < Downshift_Speed AND Throttle_Position > Throttle_Limit THEN Shift_Command = Downshift
